## Colour Coated Roofing Sheets

Durable AZ150/AZ200 roofing sheets in trapezoidal & corrugated profiles, available in brick red, blue, off-white, and grey—ideal for coastal & industrial areas like Mumbai, Raigad, and Thane.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/colour-coated-roofing-sheets/)![Roofing Accessories](https://i0.wp.com/aciersteelpvtltd.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Roofing-Accessories-Feature.webp?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)

## Roofing Accessories

Ridge covers, gutters, and flashings—manufactured in-house for leak protection and a professional finish.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/colour-coated-roofing-accessories/)![GI Decking Sheets](https://i0.wp.com/aciersteelpvtltd.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/deacking-sheets.webp?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)

## GI Decking Sheets

JSW and AMNS decking sheets (0.80–1.50 mm) ideal for mezzanine floors, slabs & composite floors—supplied across Mumbai with quick installation.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/decking-sheet/)![Color Coated Coils and Sheets](https://i0.wp.com/aciersteelpvtltd.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/colourcoatedcoils.webp?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)

## Color Coated Coils / Sheets

Pre-painted coils from TATA, JSW, AMNS, and Jindal with premium colour & anti-corrosion coatings for long-lasting life.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/color-coated-coils/)![C and Z Purlins](https://i0.wp.com/aciersteelpvtltd.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Z-and-C-Purlin.webp?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)

## C and Z Purlins

Custom roll-formed Z & C purlins (1.6–3.0 mm, 80–275 GSM), essential for roofing support—supplied across Thane, Kalamboli, and Belapur.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/purlins/)![Self Drilling Screws](https://i0.wp.com/aciersteelpvtltd.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Self-Drilling-Screws.webp?resize=400%2C250&ssl=1)

## Self Drilling Screws

Rust-resistant RX screws (25–65 mm) with epoxy coating & EPDM washers for secure, leak-proof sheet fastening.

[Explore More](https://aciersteelpvtltd.com/self-drilling-screws/)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**1\. What types of roofing sheets do you offer?**

We manufacture and supply a wide range of colour coated roofing sheets, metal roofing sheets, and TATA galvanized roofing sheets. Our inventory includes popular brands like JSW Coloron+, Jindal Sabrang, and AMNS corrugated sheets – all available in various thicknesses and coatings.

**2\. Do you provide custom lengths for roofing and decking sheets?**

Yes. Our facility in Taloja MIDC, Navi Mumbai, is equipped with a cut-to-length line that allows us to provide sheets exactly as per your required size. This reduces wastage and makes site installation more efficient.

**3\. What is the difference between GI decking sheets and regular metal roofing sheets?**

GI decking sheets are designed for structural applications like mezzanine floors and slabs. They have higher load-bearing capacity and are used with concrete. In contrast, metal roofing sheets are used for shelter and cladding. We stock both in JSW and AMNS brands.

**4\. Which areas do you deliver to?**

We offer fast delivery across Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane, Panvel, Raigad, Kalamboli, Bhiwandi, and Khopoli. Orders are typically dispatched within 24–48 hours from our Taloja MIDC facility.

**5\. Do you supply Z and C purlins for steel structures?**

Yes. We manufacture Z and C purlins in multiple sizes and thicknesses, using JSW and AMNS raw material. These are essential for supporting roofing sheets in industrial and PEB structures and are available with or without punching.

**6\. Why should I use epoxy-coated self drilling screws instead of regular screws?**

Epoxy-coated RX screws offer better corrosion resistance, come with EPDM washers for leak-proof sealing, and drill through steel without pre-drilling. They’re much more reliable than traditional GI screws and ideal for metal roofing in Mumbai’s coastal climate.

**7\. What brands do you deal in for roofing sheets and accessories?**

We supply sheets and accessories from reputed brands like JSW, TATA, AMNS, and Jindal. This includes JSW Coloron+, TATA galvanized sheets, JSW decking sheets, and AMNS corrugated sheets — all available in ready stock.

**8\. How can I place an order or request a quotation?**

You can call us directly at [+91-9930885934](tel:+919930885934), email us at [sales@aciersteelpvtltd.com](mailto:sales@aciersteelpvtltd.com), or submit an inquiry through our [website](https://www.aciersteelpvtltd.com/contact). Our team will assist you with specifications, pricing, and delivery timelines.
